title: Qatar Pauses Push to Ramp Up LNG After Hormuz Tanker Attack

summary: Qatar is pausing efforts to rapidly revive production at the world’s largest liquefied natural gas facility after an attack on one of its tankers in the Strait of Hormuz raised fears that transit through the crucial waterway is still too risky.

title: European Gas Prices Jump as Qatar Pauses Push to Ramp Up LNG
title_cn: 卡塔尔暂停增加液化天然气产量，欧洲天然气价格上涨
summary: European natural gas prices briefly jumped above €50 a megawatt-hour for the first time in a month after a report that Qatar is pausing efforts to rapidly revive production at the world’s largest liquefied natural gas facility, threatening a recovery of flows through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: US Jobless Claims Little Changed as Layoffs Remain Limited

summary: UIS initial jobless claims decreased by 2,000 to 215,000 in the week ended July 4, a period that included the Independence Day holiday. The median forecast in a Bloomberg survey of economists called for 217,000 applications. Mike McKee reports on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: Ed Zitron, CEO at EZ Primary Research, said that the risk of balancing the equity market on record public offerings for AI companies that have never reported profit is a dangerous proposition and that those companies should not be allowed to IPO. Zitron, an AI skeptic, said that many of these companies will not last in the long term. (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: Oman told the United Nations’ shipping agency that it doesn’t support imposing transit fees in the Strait of Hormuz, an approach which might set the sultanate at odds with Iran, which is pushing to charge passing freighters for navigation.

SK Hynix's US listing is more than seven times oversubscribed, according to people familiar with the matter. Anna Rosenberg of Amundi Investment Institute discusses the fragile ceasefire between the US and Iran. Andrew Graham of Jackson Square Capital looks at the rebound in equities. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Starbucks Taps AI to Cut Reliance on Microsoft, IBM Software
title_cn: 星巴克利用人工智能来减少对微软、IBM 软件的依赖
summary: Starbucks Corp. is developing in-house tools with the help of artificial intelligence that could replace some software applications it now buys from companies such as Microsoft Corp. and International Business Machines Corp.

title: Micron Raises Planned Spending to Meet Memory Chip Demand
title_cn: 美光提高计划支出以满足内存芯片需求
summary: Micron's stock surged following the company's announcement of a planned investment of up to $3 billion aimed at bolstering the U.S. semiconductor supply chain. Ed Ludlow has more on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: GOP Candidates Break With Trump on Data Centers to Boost Midterm Odds
title_cn: 共和党候选人在数据中心问题上与特朗普决裂以提高中期胜算
summary: Progressive lawmakers Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Bernie Sanders led the first wave of opposition to data centers. Now Republican candidates around the US are seizing on the fervor even as President Donald Trump actively courts tech titans and promotes the rapid, streamlined expansion of the energy-hungry facilities.

title: Racquel Oden on Market, Inflation and AI Rally
title_cn: 拉克尔·奥登 (Racquel Oden) 谈市场、通胀和人工智能集会
summary: Racquel Oden, HSBC’s head of wealth and private banking, discussed how she is guiding clients through rapidly shifting market narratives. She emphasized focusing on long-term fundamentals. (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: Tata Consultancy Services Ltd. reported a nearly 5% rise in quarterly profit with a string of cost-cutting efforts and deals helping Asia’s largest outsourcer weather a slump in the sector.

title: Reporters’ Social Media Challenge Lands With a Thud
title_cn: 记者的社交媒体挑战赛轰动一时
summary: They find posting feels like a performance rather than real communication

title: A Startup That Builds AI Agents Used One to Raise $100 Million

summary: A startup that helps enterprises build AI agents proved the technology’s value in the most practical way possible: by deploying one during its own fundraising.

title_cn: 劳动力短缺给数据中心建设带来了缺陷
summary: Contractors like Sterling Infrastructure and Comfort Systems USA have more work than they have skilled labor for.

title: Apple Supplier Luxshare Drops After $3 Billion Hong Kong Debut
title_cn: 苹果供应商立讯精密在香港上市 30 亿美元后股价下跌
summary: Apple Inc. supplier Luxshare Precision Industry Co. fell in its Hong Kong trading debut on Thursday after raising HK$24.3 billion ($3.1 billion) in the city’s biggest listing this year so far.

title: Can India Leverage Talent to Catch Up in the AI Race?
title_cn: 印度能否利用人才在人工智能竞赛中迎头赶上？
summary: India faces a critical question: should it invest in building its own, frontier AI models despite shortfalls in chips, infrastructure and funding? In the first episode of Bloomberg's Emerging podcast, Menaka Doshi dives into whether sovereignty, security, and long‑term competitiveness justify the push. She sits down in Mumbai with Srikanth Velamakanni, co‑founder of Fractal Analytics, India's first publicly listed pure-play AI company, and Ganesh Ramakrishnan, a professor at the Indian Institute of Technology-Bombay and a member of India's BharatGen AI taskforce. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SK Hynix US Listing Is Seven Times Oversubscribed
title_cn: SK海力士美国上市超额认购七倍
summary: SK Hynix Inc.’s US offering is more than seven times oversubscribed, according to people familiar with the matter, underscoring strong investor appetite despite recent volatility in the Korean memory chipmaker’s shares. Bloomberg's Neil Campling has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: One of the World's Largest Hedge Funds on its 86x Growth in Token Spending
title_cn: 全球最大的对冲基金之一，其代币支出增长了 86 倍
summary: We've gone through a number of a technological revolutions in investing whether it was the dawn of the high frequency trading era or the introduction of robotraders. When it comes to AI, the big question that remains in the investment context is whether or not the technology will be implemented like those past tech innovations — meaning it will be integrated into the flow of the business without upending everything as we know it — or if AI will transform the very nature of investing. Right now, AI's use in investing is a mixed bag. Today, we speak with Man Group's CTO Gary Collier and Head of Data and AI Tushara Fernando about how one of the largest publicly-traded hedge funds in the world is actually implementing AI into its work. We speak with them about empowering their quants with AI tools, the challenge of integrating AI safely, and the creative ways their staff is thinking about token spending, which is up 86 fold this year. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Capex Cycle Hasn't Reached Overspend Yet: BlackRock
title_cn: 人工智能资本支出周期尚未达到超支：贝莱德
summary: Helen Jewell, BlackRock's fundamental equities international CIO, discusses investment in the artificial intelligence space, saying "the next few years are very clear from an AI perspective because of the amount of capital that you'll see being invested in that space." Speaking on Bloomberg Television, Jewell adds that while every capex cycle reaches the point when overspend starts to happen, that is not the case yet. "We don't believe that we're there now." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran Ceasefire Was Built to Fail Says Marc Champion
title_cn: 马克·钱皮恩 (Marc Champion) 表示，伊朗停火是为了失败
summary: The US military struck Iran for the second straight day, an escalation of violence that threatens efforts to reach a permanent peace deal. Bloomberg Opinion's Marc Champion joins Caroline Hepker and Lizzy Burden on Daybreak Europe to discuss why he believes The war and ceasefire terms did not represent Iran's "unconditional surrender" and why the ambiguous language has allowed both sides to continue pursuing their war aims by other means. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Emerging: Can India Catch Up in the AI Race?
title_cn: 新兴市场：印度能否在人工智能竞赛中迎头赶上？
summary:
AI is becoming a new measure of global power, built on chips and the infrastructure that powers them. But while India has the talent and the data, it still lacks many of the critical building blocks to be a leader on frontier AI.

In the first episode of Emerging, a monthly podcast series, host Menaka Doshi examines India’s AI trilemma: Can the world’s most populous country achieve AI sovereignty without controlling the technology’s most advanced layers? She’s joined by Srikanth Velamakanni, co-founder of Fractal Analytics, India’s first publicly listed pure-play AI company, and Ganesh Ramakrishnan, a professor at the Indian Institute of Technology-Bombay, to explore how India hopes to turn its talent, scale and innovation into a competitive edge. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Wall Street Banks Miss Multibillion-Dollar AI Deals in Hong Kong
title_cn: 华尔街银行错失香港数十亿美元的人工智能交易
summary: Wall Street banks were largely absent from a $5.8 billion fundraising spree by Chinese artificial intelligence stars in Hong Kong this week.

title: Bain Capital Exits Kioxia After Chip Deal Yields Big Returns
title_cn: 芯片交易带来丰厚回报后，贝恩资本退出 Kioxia
summary: Bain Capital has sold its entire stake in flash memory chipmaker Kioxia Holdings Corp., closing a chapter on a deal that’s transformed the Japanese tech and investment landscape.

title: China’s Reflation Shows Signs of Peaking as War Shock Fades
title_cn: 随着战争冲击的消退，中国的通货再膨胀显示出见顶迹象
summary: China’s reflationary momentum showed signs of stalling in June, a reminder that the outlook for domestic prices is fragile as the economy emerges from deflation after an easing of tensions over Iran led to a pullback in commodity costs.

title: China Chipmaker CXMT to Launch $4.3 Billion IPO Next Week
title_cn: 中国芯片制造商长鑫存储将于下周启动 43 亿美元的 IPO
summary: Memory giant CXMT Corp. will open investor subscriptions for its public offering next week, kicking off the final stage of China’s most highly anticipated listing of the year.

title: Australia Rail Services Resuming After Telstra Outage
title_cn: 澳大利亚铁路服务在 Telstra 断电后恢复
summary: Disrupted rail services in Australia were starting to resume Thursday, after a Telstra Group Ltd. network outage knocked out mobile and data services across the country a day earlier and halted trains in some areas.

title: Recruiters Shift Focus to Specialized AI Jobs to Stay Relevant
title_cn: 招聘人员将重点转向专门的人工智能工作以保持相关性
summary: Recruitment companies, facing the threat of artificial intelligence tools replacing human labor and customers embracing AI-assisted applicant screening, are adapting by honing in on niche, in-demand jobs in the AI economy.

title: ADB Chief Economist on APAC Growth Outlook
title_cn: 亚行首席经济学家谈亚太地区增长前景
summary: Albert Park, Chief Economist at the Asian Development Bank, discusses the bank’s latest APAC growth outlook. The forecast sees growth staying subdued despite a modest improvement, as disruptions from the Middle East conflict continue to weigh on supply chains and production costs. He speaks with Shery Ahn on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ispace CEO on Lunar Transportation Plans With SpaceX
title_cn: Ispace 首席执行官与 SpaceX 探讨月球运输计划
summary: Takeshi Hakamada, Founder and CEO at Ispace, discusses the company's plans to to create a lunar payload service to be launched aboard a SpaceX Starship rocket. He speaks with Shery Ahn on Bloomberg: The Asia Trade. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Zhipu Surges 22% After $4 Billion Share Sale Priced at Low End
title_cn: 以低端价格出售 40 亿美元股票后，智浦股价飙升 22%
summary: Shares in Chinese artificial-intelligence model maker Zhipu surged as much as 22% in Hong Kong on Thursday after the company priced a $4 billion share sale at the low end of the marketed range.

title: How Wayfair Has Built AI Into Its Future
title_cn: Wayfair 如何将人工智能融入未来
summary: Furniture and home goods retailer Wayfair has built a thriving e-commerce platform that's been incorporating advanced technologies throughout its 25-year history. On Bloomberg Chief Future Officer, CFO Kate Gulliver tells Carol Massar how the company is now using AI to improve the customer experience and enhance internal business processes. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Carney Gets High Marks on Economy Despite Recession Talk, Poll Says
title_cn: 民意调查显示，尽管有经济衰退的言论，卡尼在经济方面仍获得高分
summary: Canadians support Mark Carney’s approach to managing the economy, even though he’s presided over the worst first year of growth for a prime minister since at least 1963.

title: ActBlue Pulls In $586 Million for Democrats as Midterms Approach
title_cn: 随着中期选举的临近，ActBlue 为民主党筹集 5.86 亿美元
summary: ActBlue raised $586 million for Democratic candidates and causes in the second quarter, a record amount that will enhance the party’s fortunes as it prepares to confront Republicans in midterm elections that are projected to be the most expensive in US history.

title: EU to Favor European Providers in Public Service Contracts
title_cn: 欧盟将在公共服务合同中支持欧洲提供商
summary: The European Union is finalizing sweeping changes to its procurement rules that will allow national governments favor European suppliers in critical public services.

title: Why Did Trump Switch Planes on His Way Back From NATO?
title_cn: 特朗普为何在从北约返回途中调换飞机？
summary: President Donald Trump’s return to the US from the NATO summit in Turkey took a detour when he switched Air Force One planes at a military base in the United Kingdom. Annmarie Hordern reports from Ankara. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How the Democrats Will Replace Platner on Maine’s Senate Ballot
title_cn: 民主党将如何在缅因州参议院投票中取代普拉特纳
summary: Maine Democrats are racing to salvage their bid to defeat Sen. Susan Collins after Graham Platner suspended his campaign Wednesday evening.

title: Trump Gives Ukraine a Boost, Bolstering West’s Optimism
title_cn: 特朗普提振乌克兰，提振西方乐观情绪
summary: A Patriot missiles promise and praise for Zelenskyy adds to Kyiv’s momentum

title: Merz Says Political Fringes Will Send Germany to ‘the Abyss’
title_cn: 默茨表示政治边缘将使德国陷入“深渊”
summary: Chancellor Friedrich Merz made a plea for Germany’s political middle ground as he touted a comprehensive reform agenda — and warned that the rise of fringe parties including the far right risks sending the country “into the abyss.”

title: Platner Suspends Maine Senate Bid After Assault Allegation
title_cn: 袭击指控后普拉特纳暂停缅因州参议院竞选
summary: Graham Platner suspended his US Senate campaign in Maine following a sexual assault allegation that caused his support from fellow Democrats to collapse, throwing a crucial race for the party into turmoil.

title: Talarico’s $30 Million Haul Crushes Paxton in Texas Race
title_cn: Talarico 在德克萨斯州比赛中以 3000 万美元的成绩击败 Paxton
summary: Texas Democrat James Talarico received $30 million in second-quarter donations in his campaign for US Senate, more than tripling the amount Republican challenger Ken Paxton amassed in what will be one of the most expensive campaigns of the November midterm elections.

title: El legado de Fujimori expone los límites de la estrategia anti-China de Trump en Perú
title_cn: 藤森的遗产暴露了特朗普在秘鲁反华战略的局限性
summary: Keiko Fujimori podría ser el tipo de líder que Donald Trump desea en América Latina. Pero los profundos vínculos de Perú con China muestran lo difícil que será para Washington revertir los avances de Pekín en la región.

title: Starmer Exits World Stage Unsure His Foreign Policy Will Endure
title_cn: 斯塔默退出世界舞台，不确定他的外交政策能否持久
summary: Keir Starmer’s swansong trip as Britain’s prime minister to the NATO summit this week sought to cement a shaky diplomatic legacy for a successor who’s untested in the international arena.

title: Stranded Oil Ships Clear Out of Gulf as Owners Get Wary Again
title_cn: 船东再次保持警惕，搁浅的油船已离开海湾
summary: A huge backlog of oil tankers that got stuck inside the Persian Gulf because of the Iran war has almost cleared out — just in time for a fresh military flare up to create renewed uncertainty about how safe the region is for ships.

title: Ukraine Hits More Russian Fuel Tankers as Shortages Worsen
title_cn: 随着短缺加剧，乌克兰袭击了更多俄罗斯油轮
summary: Ukraine said it hit 12 more tankers in southern Russia as Kyiv expands the scope of attacks that are deepening a nationwide gasoline shortage.

title: India and Australia Clinch Energy, Security Deals to Deepen Ties
title_cn: 印度和澳大利亚达成能源、安全协议以深化关系
summary: India and Australia clinched deals ranging from energy to defense on Thursday, taking their bilateral relationship to a new level in response to growing concern over security in the Indo-Pacific.

title: Chinese Officials Gauge US Truce, Elections in Low-Key Meetings
title_cn: 中国官员在低调会议上评估美国休战和选举
summary: A pair of former Chinese diplomats visited the US last month to better understand the Trump administration’s stance on a fragile trade truce, according to people familiar with the matter, as China seeks to gauge how upcoming US elections might affect ties.

title: Germany Proposes Consumer Levy to Fund Emergency Gas Reserve
title_cn: 德国提议征收消费者税以资助紧急天然气储备
summary: The German government has proposed adding a surcharge to consumer energy bills to help finance a strategic natural gas reserve designed to keep supplies flowing in a worst-case crisis.

title: NATO Success Is Surviving a Summit With Trump
title_cn: 北约的成功在于与特朗普的峰会
summary: By the time he had departed Turkey’s capital, Trump said he felt the “love” of the other leaders.

title: US, Iran Trade Attacks, Casting Doubt on Talks
title_cn: 美国、伊朗贸易攻击，对谈判产生质疑
summary: The US military struck Iran for a second day, hitting about 90 targets to further degrade the Islamic Republic’s ability to attack commercial shipping in the Strait of Hormuz. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How the Future of Hormuz Is Testing Oman’s Balancing Act
title_cn: 霍尔木兹的未来如何考验阿曼的平衡行为
summary: Oman has been thrust to the forefront of global geopolitics by the Iran war and closure of the Strait of Hormuz.

title: India Pushes Back Against US Forced-Labor Claims as Tariffs Loom
title_cn: 关税迫在眉睫，印度反击美国强迫劳动指控
summary: India defended itself against the threat of higher US tariffs, arguing that Washington failed to provide evidence the country lacked policies preventing forced labor, and was thereby disadvantaging American businesses.

title: Swiss See ‘Good Chance’ of a Lasting 15% Tariff Deal With US
title_cn: 瑞士认为与美国达成持久 15% 关税协议的“好机会”
summary: There is a “good chance” Switzerland will secure a lasting trade deal with the US at 15% tariff rates to put last summer’s economic spat behind it, according to the country’s top trade diplomat.

title: Fujimori Legacy Shows Limits of Trump’s Push Against China in Peru
title_cn: 藤森遗产显示特朗普在秘鲁对华施压的局限性
summary: Alberto Fujimori’s first trip to Beijing 35 years ago helped turn Peru toward China, anticipating a broader Latin American realignment that Washington is still struggling to reverse.

title: Narco Violence, Fiscal Risk Await Trump’s New Colombian Ally
title_cn: 毒品暴力和财政风险等待着特朗普的新哥伦比亚盟友
summary: Abelardo de la Espriella is going to need Donald Trump’s help once again.

title: Australia Agrees to Sell Uranium to India During Modi Visit
title_cn: 澳大利亚同意在莫迪访问期间向印度出售铀
summary: Australia has agreed to sell uranium to India for power generation in a landmark deal signed between the two nations during a visit to Melbourne by Prime Minister Narendra Modi.

title: Trump Says Spain Agreed to Pay More
title_cn: 特朗普称西班牙同意支付更多费用
summary: US President Donald Trump said Spain, a NATO partner, agreed to pay more after he threatened them with a trade embargo during the bloc’s summit. Trump didn’t specify what payments he was referring to or who he spoke with from Spain. Oliver Crook reports from Ankara, Turkey. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NATO Becomes the Trump-Erdogan Show and Everyone Gets a Gun
title_cn: 北约成为特朗普-埃尔多安秀，每个人都有枪
summary: Donald Trump told NATO leaders he was feeling the love at the end of a two-day summit in Ankara.

title: Iran War: US Strikes Iran for Second Day | Daybreak Europe 7/9/2026
title_cn: 伊朗战争：美国连续第二天袭击伊朗|欧洲黎明 7/9/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

On today's show, the US carried out a second day of strikes on Iran. US Central Command says around 90 targets were hit. The Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps says it struck US bases in Kuwait and Bahrain. Asked if a full-scale military campaign would resume, US President Donald Trump said, “I don’t know,” but it would be won “very quickly.”

Minutes from the Fed's June meeting show that 'a few' officials said there was a case for raising interest rates, though they ultimately supported the decision to stay on hold. 

Today's guest: Trevor Charsley, Corpay, Senior Technical Strategist. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Former Speedboat Racer’s Startup Is Europe’s Newest Defense Unicorn
title_cn: 前快艇运动员的初创公司是欧洲最新的国防独角兽
summary: Mal Crease spent years breaking records as a speedboat racer before forming a company to build boats without crews. Now his firm, Kraken Technology Group, is the latest European defense startup worth north of $1 billion.
